fields.title: Enabled
fields.help: Start the Voice-Orb plugin when Ponderer boots.

fields.title: Model
fields.help: Hugging Face model id or local model directory. VoiceDesign should use a VoiceDesign checkpoint.

fields.title: Model Cache
fields.help: Portable local cache for downloaded model weights.

fields.title: Output Folder
fields.help: Where generated audio files are written.

fields.title: Precision
fields.help: Torch dtype used when loading the model.

fields.title: Attention
fields.help: Attention backend. Flash Attention can reduce VRAM if supported.

fields.title: Default Language
fields.help: Passed to Qwen3-TTS when no per-call language override is supplied.

fields.title: Default Voice Description
fields.help: Base VoiceDesign prompt used when a tool call does not supply one.
fields.default_value: Warm, articulate, steady, emotionally grounded, with clear diction and a calm cadence.

fields.title: Persona Drift
fields.help: Let persona-evolution events subtly influence the active voice description.

fields.title: Auto Speak Replies
fields.help: Expose guidance that the agent may speak completed replies when useful. This does not force playback by itself.

fields.title: Auto-play Generated Audio
fields.help: Automatically play newly generated Voice-Orb audio clips when they appear in chat.

fields.title: Allow CPU Fallback
fields.help: If enabled, meta-tensor failures may retry on CPU (can dramatically increase RAM use).

fields.title: Max Input Characters
fields.help: Clamp very long text before synthesis to keep generation memory bounded.

fields.title: Max RSS (MB)
fields.help: Soft per-process memory budget. Voice-Orb refuses synthesis above this and unloads when exceeded.

fields.title: Max New Tokens
fields.help: Upper token budget for speech generation. Clamped to a safe range in runtime.

fields.title: Unload After Synthesis
fields.help: Unload model after each clip (lower idle RAM, but can cause spikes/reload stalls on some backends).
